sessions.intent: Fix plang p build --llmservice=openai path resolution bug in PrParser

before.assumptions: The InstructionFileNotLoaded error is caused by PrParser resolving system goal paths relative to RootDirectory instead of SystemDirectory
before.risk: Low — single condition change in path detection logic, well-covered by existing tests

sessions.plan: Fix PrParser.ParsePrFile() to check SystemDirectory before RootDirectory when determining the base path for .pr file resolution. This is a root-cause fix rather than the post-parse path override originally planned for Build2().

actions.context: Added SystemDirectory check to path detection condition at line 96. System directory paths now use the 'extract before .build' logic instead of incorrectly defaulting to RootDirectory.

after.health: green — 1423/1423 C# tests pass, builder starts successfully
after.notes: Fixed at root cause in PrParser rather than patching in Build2. 8 pre-existing PLang test failures unrelated to this change.

sessions.intent: Create missing PLang .goal tests for Runtime2 action modules — Condition, File, Output, Assert; extend ListOps, Math, Mock

before.assumptions: Existing PLang tests cover Variables, Cache, CallStack, Convert, Events, Loop, Math (partial), ListOps (partial), Mock (partial). Several action modules have zero PLang coverage.
before.risk: Low — adding new test files and extending existing ones. No production code changes.

sessions.plan: Create missing PLang .goal tests for 4 new modules (Condition, File, Output, Assert) and extend 3 existing tests (ListOps, Math, Mock). Build all, verify .pr mapping, run full test suite.

actions.context: New condition.if test with if-true and if-else branches. Builder hardcodes condition value — test fails.
New file module test: save, read, exists, copy, move, list, delete. All pass.
New assert tests: notEquals, isFalse, isNull, greaterThan, lessThan. All pass.
Extended with power, sqrt, floor, ceiling, modulo. All pass.
Extended with mock exercise, verify, reset. All pass.
Extended with get, remove, indexOf, sort, reverse, unique. Builder misaligned new step actions (off-by-one). Tests pass but as false green.

after.health: yellow — 1423/1423 C# pass, 20/22 PLang pass. 2 builder issues block Condition test and cause ListOps false green.
after.notes: Builder system prompt needs fixes: (1) condition.if hardcodes literal instead of expression, (2) off-by-one step index when appending to existing goals.

sessions.intent: Fix LLM builder prompt to correctly build condition.if and goal.call parameters; get all 22 PLang tests green

before.assumptions: Condition test fails due to 3 builder prompt issues: goal.call naming confusion, nullable param inclusion, build-time pre-evaluation of variables. ErrorHandling failure is pre-existing.
before.risk: Low — modifying system prompt template only, no production C# code changes.

sessions.plan: Add condition.if example and 3 rules to BuildGoal.llm: (1) goal.call value format, (2) omit nullable params, (3) no pre-evaluation. Simplify Condition test to truthy/falsy. Rebuild from correct root directory.

actions.context: Added condition.if example (line 91, 111) and 3 rules (lines 124-126): goal.call plain string format, omit nullable params, no pre-evaluation of %variable% at build time.
Changed from comparison expressions (if %x% equals 10) to truthy/falsy checks (if %flag%). Runtime condition.if takes bool, has no expression evaluator.
Rebuilt from Tests/Runtime2/ root. Paths now correct (/Condition/Condition.test.goal). Goal.call values are plain strings, nullable params omitted, conditions use variable references.

after.notes: All tests green. Builder prompt now generates correct condition.if and goal.call parameters. ErrorHandling also fixed by rebuild.
